enchantment.defenders.footwork.desc: Reduces the movement penalty while blocking by 10% per level.
enchantment.defenders.reprisal.desc: After a perfect parry, your next melee attack within 2 secs deals +1 damage per level.
enchantment.defenders.finesse.desc: Adds +0.5 melee damage per level while this Defender is equipped off hand.
enchantment.defenders.reflexes.desc: Extends the perfect-parry window by 0.1 secs per level.
enchantment.defenders.deflection.desc: Reduce all damage 10% per level (+5% for melee).
enchantment.defenders.sixth_sense.desc: Has a 10% chance to auto-parry melee attacks and makes attackers glow for 5 secs on any parry.
tooltip.defenders.silver: +2 main-hand damage vs undead; 1 perfect-parry retaliation damage
tooltip.defenders.myrmex: +4 main-hand damage vs non-anthropods and Death Worms.
tooltip.defenders.stinger: +4 main-hand damage vs non-anthropods and Death Worms. Poison III for 10s on main-hand hits and perfect parries
tooltip.defenders.flamed: Ignites targets; bonus damage vs ice dragons
tooltip.defenders.iced: Freezes targets; Slowness/Mining Fatigue III; bonus damage vs fire dragons
tooltip.defenders.electric: Chain-lightning effect; bonus damage vs fire and ice dragons
tooltip.defenders.living: Perfect parry: Immalleable I for 5 secs when available
tooltip.defenders.sentient: Perfect parry: Immalleable I and Viral I for 5 secs when available
advancement.defenders.a_monkeys_uncle.de: Hmmm... funny you should say that.
